hook: In England, the longest waits for mental-health care now stretch close to two years.
vo: More than twice as long as the longest waits for physical-health treatment.
Around 1 in 4 people experience a mental-health problem each year.
Independent therapists carry a lot of that unmet need.
Faresay helps them do it fairly — free to start, no commission on sessions, you keep what you charge.
cta: If you see private clients, Faresay is worth a look.
broll_notes: Slow scroll through a long paper waiting list, then a quiet therapy room — empty chair, soft light, a phone on a desk. No faces. No NHS logos.
